class.name: FmodDSPConnection
class.brief_description: Represents a connection between DSP nodes in the audio processing graph.
class.description: FmodDSPConnection represents a connection between two FmodDSP units in the FMOD DSP signal processing graph. It allows control over the signal flow, including volume mixing and channel matrix routing.

method.name: get_input
method.description: Gets the input DSP unit of this connection.

method.name: get_mix
method.description: Gets the volume scale of the connection in dB.

method.name: get_mix_matrix
method.description: Gets the 2D pan matrix that maps signals from input channels (columns) to output speakers (rows).

method.name: get_output
method.description: Gets the output DSP unit of this connection.

method.name: get_type
method.description: Gets the connection type between the two DSP units.

method.name: set_mix
method.description: Sets the volume scale of the connection in dB.

method.name: set_mix_matrix
method.description: Sets a 2D pan matrix that maps signals from input channels (columns) to output speakers (rows).

members.member: The volume mix level of the connection in dB.

constants.constant: Standard connection type where the input DSP's output is fed directly to the output DSP's input.
Sidechain connection type where the input DSP's output is fed to the output DSP's sidechain input.
Send connection type for routing signals to auxiliary buses.
Send sidechain connection type combining send and sidechain behavior.
Preallocated connection type for internal FMOD use.
Forces the connection type to be an integer type.
